prompts.scenario:
Using the reference crop, recreate ONLY this asset as a clean 2D mobile game sprite.

Asset: Player Castle Exterior
Category: castle
Description: A tall, grey stone castle with two blue-roofed towers, a wooden base, and tank treads. Thick black outlines and flat colors.
Gameplay role: The player's main base that houses units and takes damage.

=== STYLE LOCK (must match exactly across every asset in this game) ===
Overall: Casual 2D cartoon mobile game with thick black outlines, flat colors, and a sticker-like aesthetic.
Rendering technique: 2D vector-style cartoon
Line work: Thick, consistent black outlines on all foreground elements.
Palette: Muted earth tones for the environment, with saturated primary colors for characters, projectiles, and UI elements.
Shading: Flat colors with minimal shading on characters/props; soft gradients used sparingly in the background.
Scale / proportions: Chibi/stylized proportions, sticker-like characters and props.
DO NOT use any of these styles: pixel art, 3D rendered, photorealistic, voxel, painterly, highly detailed.
Match this style regardless of what the asset depicts — do not default to genre tropes (e.g. ninjas as pixel art, robots as voxel, fantasy as painterly) unless the lock above says so.

Preserve the source asset's silhouette, color family, proportions, camera angle, and readable details.
Improve video compression artifacts and make the asset crisp and production-quality.
Center the asset with comfortable transparent padding.

Remove everything that is not the asset: no background, no wall, no character, no hand cursor, no UI, no smoke/trail/impact particles unless explicitly part of the target.
Use a transparent background PNG when supported. If transparency is not preserved, use a plain simple background that can be removed cleanly.
Do not add new objects or change the gameplay read.

notes: Video crop is reference evidence; Scenario recreation supplies final pixels.
